headline: Simplified public mobile entry by reducing planning-deck style sections and keeping the route flow focused.
focus: Make the home/planner entry feel less like an internal pitch deck and more like a direct travel editorial app.
notes: Softened remaining internal labels such as Launch paths and Issue into public-facing travel copy.
Hid or compacted planning-style growth explainer sections on mobile entry surfaces.
Reduced oversized hero pressure while preserving the v207 loading and generated-result flow.
Added extra spacing around photo grids so the bottom dock feels less intrusive.
